caption: A large group of people is gathered in a bright, open-sided hall with white curtains and a high ceiling. Most of the attendees are men wearing light-colored button-down shirts, some in blue and others in white, while some wear face masks. A man in a red shirt sits among them. In the foreground, a man with glasses and a white shirt is seated, while others are arranged in rows of white chairs. In the background, a man in a white outfit stands at a podium, addressing the crowd. As the sequence progresses, a man in a red shirt raises his hands in a gesture, and a man in a white shirt in the foreground also raises his hand and arm, appearing to react or signal to someone. Water bottles and small tables are scattered throughout the seating area. A small, illegible logo appears in the bottom right corner of the frames.
